name: Volta Resources Inc.
description: Volta Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based resource company primarily focused on the exploration and development of gold properties in West Africa. The company maintains a portfolio of quality gold exploration projects located in Burkina Faso and Ghana, which are recognized as mining-friendly jurisdictions with proven world-class gold deposits. Key assets in its portfolio have included the Kiaka Gold Project, the Gaoua Project, and the Titao Gold Project. The company, which previously traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol VTR, has historically operated with its head office in Toronto, Ontario.
